name: Town Center
tagline: Retail-dominant configuration. Restaurant pads on Bissonnet frontage, medical office cluster, neighborhood services. Red...
description: Retail-dominant configuration. Restaurant pads on Bissonnet frontage, medical office cluster, neighborhood services. Reduced industrial allocation. Target: walkable mixed-use town center.
target_profile: Optimized for retail, multifamily buyers. 24.4% equity IRR, 2.88x multiple over 54–62 months.

name: Logistics Corridor
tagline: Industrial/flex-dominant configuration. 60%+ industrial and flex/warehouse lots. Support retail only (gas, food, conveni...
description: Industrial/flex-dominant configuration. 60%+ industrial and flex/warehouse lots. Support retail only (gas, food, convenience). Leverages Beltway 8 access and SW Houston logistics demand.
target_profile: Optimized for industrial, retail buyers. 20.5% equity IRR, 2.46x multiple over 54–62 months.

name: Workforce Village
tagline: Multifamily-anchor configuration. Maximizes multifamily acreage for EB-5 and LIHTC compatibility. Workforce housing focu...
description: Multifamily-anchor configuration. Maximizes multifamily acreage for EB-5 and LIHTC compatibility. Workforce housing focus with supporting retail and services. Target: tax credit investors and community development.
target_profile: Optimized for industrial, retail buyers. 21.4% equity IRR, 2.55x multiple over 54–62 months.

name: Premium Pad Strategy
tagline: Two-tier pricing model. Corner lots at $18/SF premium rates (Bissonnet/collector road frontage), interior lots at discou...
description: Two-tier pricing model. Corner lots at $18/SF premium rates (Bissonnet/collector road frontage), interior lots at discounted $5.50/SF flex pricing. Optimizes revenue by location-based pricing differentials.
target_profile: Optimized for industrial, retail buyers. 23.0% equity IRR, 2.72x multiple over 54–62 months.

name: Balanced Mixed-Use
tagline: Refined baseline with optimized phasing and absorption timeline. Proportional mix across all use types. Cook Corridor ad...
description: Refined baseline with optimized phasing and absorption timeline. Proportional mix across all use types. Cook Corridor adjusted to flex per broker feedback. Corner premiums applied. Staged lot releases tied to infrastructure milestones and MUD bond issuance schedule.
target_profile: Optimized for industrial, retail buyers. 22.4% equity IRR, 2.66x multiple over 54–62 months.

name: Retail Intersection Clustering
tagline: Retail concentrated at road intersections per broker recommendation. Interior Kirkwood/Cook lots shift to flex. Deeper corner pads for QSR/retail anchors.
description: Retail specialist-driven reconfiguration. Clusters retail development at the intersections where ITPH internal roads meet Bissonnet, S Kirkwood, and Cook Rd. Interior corridor lots (S Kirkwood, Cook) shift from retail to flex/light industrial — addressing broker feedback that these locations are less enthusiastically embraced by the retail market. Corner pads sized for QSR anchors (McDonalds, Chick-fil-A, etc.) requiring deeper lots. Multifamily anchors retained for EB-5/LIHTC compatibility.
target_profile: Optimized for broker absorption. Corner retail at $18/SF premium, flex interior at $10/SF. Target: faster retail lease-up, realistic market positioning.
